query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `contracts` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `code` varchar(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `business_number` varchar(20) UNIQUE,
  `signed_date` date,
  `signed_year` int,
  `signed_seq` int,
  `is_signed` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `clientId` int NOT NULL,
  `contract_seq` int,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `totalValue` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `startDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `endDate` timestamp NULL,
  `status` enum('active','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `observations` text,
  `pdf_url` varchar(1000),
  `pdf_file_key` varchar(500),
  `manager_user_id` int,
  `manager_name` varchar(255),
  `manager_email` varchar(255),
  `approver_name` varchar(255),
  `approver_email` varchar(255),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `financial_milestones` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `contract_id` int NOT NULL,
  `amendment_id` int,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `valor_previsto` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `valor_pago` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `due_date` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `prazo_pagamento` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `status` enum('pending','paid','overdue','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `paid_date` timestamp NULL,
  `data_recebimento` timestamp NULL,
  `origin` enum('manual','ai') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  `confidence` decimal(3,2) DEFAULT 1.00,
  `evidence_quotes` text,
  `condition_text` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `contract_amendments` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `contract_id` int NOT NULL,
  `business_number` varchar(30) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `seq` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `tipo` enum('financeiro','escopo') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'escopo',
  `additional_value` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL,
  `start_date` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `end_date` timestamp NULL,
  `status` enum('active','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `pdf_url` varchar(500),
  `pdf_file_key` varchar(500),
  `change_types` json,
  `financial_impact` json,
  `schedule_impact` json,
  `scope_changes` text,
  `ai_analysis` json,
  `effective_date` date,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `contract_risks` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `contract_id` int NOT NULL,
  `tipo` enum('financeiro','legal','operacional','prazo') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'financeiro',
  `descricao` text NOT NULL,
  `severidade` enum('baixa','media','alta','critica') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'media',
  `acoes_mitigacao` text,
  `responsavel` varchar(255),
  `status` enum('aberto','mitigado','aceito','fechado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'aberto',
  `origin` enum('manual','ai') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  `confidence` decimal(3,2) DEFAULT 1.00,
  `evidence_quotes` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `contract_documents` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `contract_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `type` varchar(100),
  `url` varchar(1000) NOT NULL,
  `file_key` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `size` int,
  `mime_type` varchar(100),
  `ai_classification` varchar(255),
  `uploaded_by` int,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `contract_approvers` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `contract_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `role` varchar(100),
  `order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `status` enum('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `approved_at` timestamp NULL,
  `observations` text,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `contract_responsible` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `contract_id` int NOT NULL,
  `user_id` int,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255),
  `role` varchar(100),
  `type` enum('manager','approver','executor','witness') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manager',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `audit_logs` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `entityType` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `entityId` int NOT NULL,
  `action` enum('create','update','delete','apply','sign') NOT NULL,
  `changes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
